rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGINIA RAMOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/09/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Liabilities should be on a separate schedule in accordance with Probate Code 1063(g) not as part of the assets on hand at the beginning of the account. (See page 2 of Supplement). A "revised account" must be filed as an amendment or amended petition and re-noticed. (CRC 7.3, 7.53). 2) Revised entries on disbursements must be filed as an amendment or amended petition and re-noticed. (CRC 7.3, 7.53). 3) On schedule C - Disbursements please file a receipt for the following entries: 8/16/2019 San Francisco Public Utilities Commission for $7,575.42. The provide documentation does not explain this entry and it appears unusually large. 4) The provided bank statements show an ending balance in account #7636 of $48,445.47 on 11/29 and $48,365.47 on 12/01. Please explain why the account shows the ending balance of $48,911.07 on 11/31/2021. 5) There is no account statement provided for SF Credit Union account. The ending balance of assets in interim and final accounts filed by fiduciaries, who are not financial institutions, must be verified. Verification is made by original bank or brokerage statements or original bank letters signed by a bank officer with the authority to sign, showing the vesting of the account, the date, and the amount of the balance. Photocopies are not acceptable. See CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts. (See LRSF 14.34 D.) An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/25/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAMONA M. ALBRIGHT FAMILY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Petition For 1) Order To Quiet Title And Recover Trust Assets 2) Undue Incfluence - Invalidation Of Procured Trust Amendment And Other Documents, And Damages 3) Fraud 4) Order For Damages And Attorney'S Fees Under Welfare & Institutions Code 15610.30 And Probate Code Section 859 Et. Al
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner requests an order quieting title to 127 Crown, first to the 2013 trust and then in the names of Margaret Consoer and Keith Consoer as beneficiaries. However, 127 Crown appears to already be a trust asset. No allegation is made as to why quieting title is necessary and whether this has been properly presented in probate court. In addition, no showing has been made as to the necessity of quieting title to Margaret Consoer and Keith Consoer or the ability of the court to do so. 2) Petitioner requests that the court order Kieran Keaney to return property. A petition under Probate Code 850 must specify the assets to be returned and proper notice on the correct Judicial Council form must be provided. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review the 11th amended general order. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 11th amended general order.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANK DEMING WILLEY JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/02/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Please state the date of death of Kristin R. Willey. The date of death must be specified for all deceased devisees and heirs. [LRSF 14.18 D.1)] 2) Examiner received a copy of the proposed order and a cover sheet alleging a check not to exceed $100 and return envelope were provided. No check or prepaid envelope has been provided. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 7/18/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
